MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel Emili M. Calhoun and Self-represented Defendant Poneva Hamlin for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. The Order to Show Cause to Deendant's Counsel Calhoun is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Fee paid. Defendant Poneva Hamlin is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/30/2010 at 10:30 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions; Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF KENDALL WATSON's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions and Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories is moot as responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The court finds that the late responses were a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $740, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.

Plaintiff's evidentiary objections are sustained. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

ATTY. PETER S. MYERS, TEL. NO. 896-1500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT ROBERT SMITH.
